name: sdlc-full
description: SDLC Orchestrator for FULL flows (feature/cr/rebuild) — S1→S6. Auto-detects phase, routes to the correct role agent, manages gates. Use: 'sdlc feature {slug}', 'CR {slug}', 'rebuild {slug}', or natural language.

stop.command: echo '' && echo '=== Uncommitted (openspec) ===' && git diff --stat openspec/ 2>/dev/null | tail -5; OUT=$(git diff --name-only -- . ':(exclude)openspec' ':(exclude)memory' ':(exclude).kiro' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$OUT" ] && { echo '⚠ NON-SPEC FILE CHANGES detected — the orchestrator must NOT write code; only the developer agent (S4) may. Verify these came from S4:'; echo "$OUT" | head -20; }; true

userPromptSubmit.command:
python3 -c "
import json,sys,re
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
msg=d.get('user_message','').lower()
if any(k in msg for k in ['approve','nogo','no-go','dispute','status','continue','sdlc','feature','rebuild','cr']):
    print('[Pipeline] Action detected in message')
m=re.search(r'\b(\d{4,6})\b',d.get('user_message',''))
if m: print(f'[Auto-context] ticket_id: {m.group(1)}')
" 2>/dev/null||true

welcomeMessage: SDLC Full (feature/cr/rebuild). Nói "sdlc feature {tên}", "CR {tên}" hoặc "rebuild {tên}" để bắt đầu; "approve"/"status" để quản lý pipeline. Bug/hotfix → dùng sdlc-fast (ctrl+5).
